sections.script: personalized travel for the modern explorer

sections.t: Meaningful journeys · with care · clarity · and taste

sections.h: Your next chapter starts with the journey.
sections.p: Voyenne is a one-woman travel atelier for people who collect places the way others collect things. A handful of clients, a long conversation, and a trip edited down to only what matters. Placeholder copy for the template concept.

cards.d: Fjords, quiet hotels, and light that never quite leaves. For travelers who like their drama geological.
One stretch of sea, three towns, zero rushing. Long lunches as a discipline.
Big skies, small lodges, and the kind of silence you bring home with you.

sections.slotTag: slot foto — retrato de la curadora
sections.p: Placeholder bio: twelve years, forty countries, and one conviction — a great trip is edited, not stuffed. Sofía plans every journey herself, from the first call to the welcome note waiting in your room.

rows.d: Three nights minimum anywhere worth going. Unpacking is part of the luxury.
Every transfer, table, and view chosen on purpose — nothing left to default settings.
One point of contact, zero surprises, and recommendations you couldn't have googled.

sections.q: The whole experience felt so intentional — like the trip had been written just for us, because it had.

sections.h: Your next chapter starts with the journey.
